title: leersia ligularis var. ligularis
intro: Leersia ligularis var. ligularis, also known as rice cutgrass, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Leersia ligularis var. ligularis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal purposes.
